name: Fastboot Toolkit
description: Comprehensive Fastboot toolkit - Flash, Boot, OEM unlock/lock, Erase, Device info, Shell, Reboot + Boot Image Mods with boot/init_boot/vendor_boot support, LZ4 legacy ramdisk format + ADB Rescue: inject ADB key into product partition via recovery root shell for broken-screen devices (zero screen interaction, survives reboots). Pure Python.
author: Image Anarchy Team
